all.critique:
Below is a plain‐text critique of the analysis:

1. Data Loader Selection and Error Handling  
 • The analysis correctly specifies that the evaluate() method should first look for a "test" key and then fall back to "val", and if neither exists, it should raise an error. One area for improvement is that while an error is to be raised (or a log entry made) when no valid dataset is provided, the logic does not describe what type of exception is raised or whether any fallback behavior (e.g., default
